name: Cash Time Loan Centers
description_short: Cash Time Loan Centers offers title loans, personal loans, and registration loans in Phoenix, AZ with same-day funding and no credit requirement.
description_long:
Cash Time Loan Centers is a Phoenix, Arizona-based consumer lender operating a network of storefront branches across the Valley. The profiled location sits at 2030 W. Baseline Rd in the South Mountain Pavilion shopping center, serving the communities of South Phoenix, South Mountain, and Laveen. The company's positioning centers on accessibility — specifically for borrowers who cannot qualify for conventional bank financing due to poor, thin, or damaged credit histories.

Cash Time offers three core loan products: Title Loans (secured by vehicle title), Personal Loans, and Registration Loans. All three are designed for speed — the company advertises instant approval and same-day funding for many applicants. Applications can be submitted in person at the branch or entirely online, with disbursement available via direct deposit to a bank account. A fourth product, the Title Loan Buyout, allows borrowers with existing high-interest title loans from other lenders to refinance into a new Cash Time loan at purportedly lower rates and more manageable monthly payments.

Several features distinguish Cash Time from pawn-style competitors. A 24/7 online account portal lets borrowers check balances, schedule payments, and monitor available funds without branch visits. The company explicitly accepts applicants with poor credit, no credit, or those actively rebuilding — a broader acceptance window than most personal loan lenders. Branch hours run Monday through Friday 9AM–6PM with Saturday availability (10AM–4PM), though the location is closed Sundays and eight named holidays.

Cash Time addresses a real need for borrowers who are locked out of traditional credit and need fast cash. That said, title and registration loans are secured by a vehicle — defaulting creates a direct repossession risk. The website promotes 'competitive rates' and 'no hidden fees' but does not disclose specific APRs anywhere in the content reviewed. Title loan products in Arizona commonly carry annualized rates well above 100%. Prospective borrowers should request the full loan agreement, confirm the APR in writing, and calculate total repayment cost before committing.
pros: Same-day funding available with instant approval for qualifying applicants
Accepts borrowers with poor credit, no credit history, or those rebuilding credit
Online application with direct deposit — no branch visit required
Title Loan Buyout program to refinance high-rate loans from other lenders
24/7 online portal for balance checks, payment scheduling, and account management
No hidden fees explicitly stated on website
Saturday hours available (10AM–4PM) for borrowers who can't visit on weekdays
cons: Title and registration loans are secured by vehicle — default risks repossession
No APR or rate information disclosed anywhere on the website
Sunday closed; Saturday hours end at 4PM limiting weekend access
Title loan products in Arizona typically carry very high annualized interest rates despite 'competitive' marketing language
Single location profiled — limited geographic reach beyond South Phoenix
best_for: Arizona vehicle owners who need fast cash and cannot qualify for bank loans
Borrowers with poor, no, or rebuilding credit who need same-day funding
Existing title loan borrowers seeking to refinance a high-rate loan from another lender
South Phoenix, South Mountain, and Laveen residents needing emergency funds quickly
diagnosis: Cash Time is best suited for Phoenix-area borrowers who own a vehicle and need fast cash but cannot access traditional credit due to poor or no credit history. The main caveat is that title and registration loans are secured debt — the vehicle can be repossessed on default — and Cash Time does not disclose APRs publicly, which for these products in Arizona are commonly very high. Borrowers should compare total repayment cost carefully before signing.
services: Loan balance and payment scheduling online
